message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker with current task status and dependency metadata

Export latest beads state to JSONL after closing completed tasks and
updating dependency metadata for in-progress work items. Reflects
status changes from the current development cycle including VFS
cross-platform fixes, clippy compliance work, and test suite expansion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
